figures.caption: Table 3: Snapshot of stage 1 training log (every 500 epochs). Number of training points / N : 2167/4000. The neural network has 4 hidden layers and 200 neurons/layer. Time is per 500 epochs.

Figure 2: Comparison of neural network outputs (dashed lines) and ground truth solutions (light solid lines). Subplots show (q, νp) ∈ {(0, 0.3), (1, 0.8)}. Colors red, blue, and green denote β = 1, 2, 3, respectively. Setup: 4 layers, 200 neurons/layer, N = 4000.

Figure 4: Comparison of neural network outputs (dashed lines) and ground truth solutions (light solid lines). Subplots show (q, νp) ∈ {(1, 0.3), (0, 0.8)}. Colors red, blue, and green denote β = 1, 2, 3, respectively. Setup: 4 layers, 200 neurons/layer and N = 4000.
